Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance on Tuesday, October 22, 2013:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. [415.922.5939] Specially appearing for Plaintiff;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re: Plaintiff CACH, LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions.
The Pro Tem Judge had issued the following tentative ruling: Motion granted. Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions of $607.50 are awarded to Plaintiff and to be paid within 30 days of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth L. Riles; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
The Court adopts its tentative ruling re: Plaintiff CACH, LLC'S Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions.
The Pro Tem Judge had issued the following tentative ruling: This motion appears to be identical to the previous motion. Therefore, the Court believes it is now moot in light of the Court's ruling on the other motion. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth L. Riles; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
